## Summary

## Checks

- [ ] I used synthetic or public-safe examples.
- [ ] I avoided private case data, CPFs, RGs, confidential documents, and credentials.
- [ ] I preserved source traceability with page references where relevant.
- [ ] I checked generated docs, dashboards, or PDFs for accessibility expectations.
- [ ] I ran `scripts/check-sample.sh` if schema, template, or sample data changed.
- [ ] I updated README or reference docs if user-facing behavior changed.
